items.title: Not Just Transcription
items.desc: Our AI analyzes context, extracts insights, and generates content optimized for each platform's audience.

items.title: One Click, Every Platform
items.desc: All 10 formats generated simultaneously. From long-form blogs to social threads — everything ready in seconds.

items.title: Chat With Your Content
items.desc: Every output has a built-in AI chat. "Add more data", "make it punchier" — changes applied instantly.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything to

list.title: AI-Powered Rewriting
list.desc: Not just transcription — our AI understands context and rewrites for each platform's unique voice.

list.title: 10 Output Formats
list.desc: Blog posts, Twitter threads, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, newsletters, SRT subtitles, SEO articles, more.

list.title: 63+ Languages

list.title: Conversational Refinement
list.desc: Chat with each output to fine-tune it. "Make it shorter" — done.

list.title: Share & Collaborate

list.title: Private & Secure
list.desc: Files deleted after processing. Your content is never used for training.

list.title: Smart Detection
list.desc: YouTube link? → Blog + Twitter. Bilibili? → WeChat + Xiaohongshu. Automatic.

testimonials.text: "Finally a tool that understands content creation workflow. One video → all platforms in minutes. Game changer for my content schedule."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "The conversational refinement is brilliant. I can tweak each output by just chatting with it. Saves me hours every week."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "I was skeptical about AI content, but the quality genuinely surprised me. The platform-specific formatting is spot on."

testimonials.text: "As a solo founder, this tool gives me a content team's output. LinkedIn posts, blogs, tweets — all from one video."
testimonials.author: Alex Park
